hero.title: Ethiopia's Digital Logistics Platform
hero.subtitle: Connecting Freight Owners and Drivers
hero.description: Revolutionizing freight transportation in Ethiopia through technology. Post loads, find trucks, and track deliveries in real-time.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: To revolutionize Ethiopia's logistics sector by creating a seamless digital platform that connects freight owners with reliable drivers, making transportation efficient, transparent, and accessible to all.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.description: To become Ethiopia's most trusted digital logistics platform, empowering businesses and drivers while contributing to the growth of the nation's economy through innovative technology solutions.

story.title: Our Story
story.description: Ethiochinet was born from a simple observation: Ethiopia's logistics sector was fragmented, inefficient, and lacked transparency. In 2023, our founding team came together to bridge this gap.

features.title: Platform Features
features.subtitle: Everything you need to manage your logistics operations efficiently

smartMatching.title: Smart Freight Matching
smartMatching.description: AI-powered algorithm matches your freight with the most suitable drivers in real-time.

verifiedDrivers.title: Verified Drivers
verifiedDrivers.description: All drivers undergo thorough verification for your peace of mind.

notifications.title: Real-time Notifications
notifications.description: Instant updates on your freight status, driver location, and delivery confirmations.

secure.title: Secure Platform
secure.description: End-to-end encrypted transactions and secure payment processing.

pricing.title: Transparent Pricing
pricing.description: Clear, upfront pricing with no hidden fees or surprises.

network.title: Nationwide Network
network.description: Access to a growing network of drivers across all major Ethiopian cities.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Simple steps to start your logistics journey with Ethiochinet

testimonials.title: What Our Customers Say
testimonials.subtitle: Trusted by freight owners and drivers across Ethiopia

partners.title: Our Partners & Supporters
partners.subtitle: Working together with industry leaders to transform Ethiopia's logistics sector

blog.title: Blog & News
blog.subtitle: Insights and updates from Ethiochinet and the logistics industry

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Find answers to common questions about Ethiochinet

footer.description: Transforming Ethiopia's logistics through technology, connecting freight owners with drivers seamlessly across the nation.
